html:
Exclusive to:

The Bent Spork can be obtained by trading Fishes with the King of the Merms.

It can be used as a reusable Lure for the Sea Fishing Rod.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.33 days.

The Bent Spork can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_17".

×2

Miscellaneous
"trinket_17"
Exclusive to:
“A horrifyingly failed utensil fusion. I guess science *can* go too far.”
–Wilson
“Metal bends when it gets nice and hot.”
–Willow
“Is still good!”
–Wolfgang
“Two utensils that are one. It reminds me of myself and Abigail.”
–Wendy
“SUCH SENSELESS VIOLENCE”
–WX-78
“This would be a practical eating utensil if it weren't bent.”
–Wickerbottom
“It needs to be straightened, eh?”
–Woodie
“The product of a very immature magician, perhaps.”
–Maxwell
“A pöör weapön.”
–Wigfrid
“Spork. Spork. Spork. Hahaha!”
–Webber
“A pity.”
–Warly
“Pokey shiny thing”
–Wormwood
“A waste of good metal.”
–Winona
“I haven't got the tine for that!”
–Wortox
“Food scooper.”
–Wurt
“One less utensil to pack with your camping gear!”
–Walter
“Think about how much time I'll save if I only need to use one utensil!”
–Wanda
The Bent Spork can be obtained by trading Fishes with the King of the Merms.
It can be used as a reusable Lure for the Sea Fishing Rod.
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.33 days.
The Bent Spork can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_17".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Con quay cong có thể thu được bằng cách trao đổi Cá với Vua Người cá.
